# INTEGRATION_MAP.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - Spec Writer Agent (A07) -- pre-spec DPA check
#   - Dependency Mapper Agent (A06) -- cross-service impact analysis
#   - Event Schema Agent (A21) -- Kafka integration schema governance
#   - Architecture Doc Agent (A31) -- system context diagram
#   - Brownfield Discovery Agent (A14) -- integration discovery baseline
#
# List every external system this service calls (outbound) or is
# called by (inbound). External = outside this service's codebase.
# Internal services owned by Telia are also listed here.
#
# DPA = Data Processing Agreement. Required before sending personal
# data to any third-party system. Mark Unknown if you need to verify.
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.

---

**DPA status:** [Yes -- confirmed / No -- required before go-live / Unknown]
